역대하 15:1.content: The Spirit of God came on Azariah the son of Oded:

역대하 15:2.content: and he went out to meet Asa, and said to him, “Hear me, Asa, and all Judah and Benjamin! Yahweh is with you, while you are with him; and if you seek him, he will be found by you; but if you forsake him, he will forsake you.

역대하 15:3.content: Now for a long time Israel was without the true God, without a teaching priest, and without law.

역대하 15:4.content: But when in their distress they turned to Yahweh, the God of Israel, and sought him, he was found by them.

역대하 15:5.content: In those times there was no peace to him who went out, nor to him who came in; but great troubles were on all the inhabitants of the lands.

역대하 15:6.content: They were broken in pieces, nation against nation, and city against city; for God troubled them with all adversity.

역대하 15:7.content: But you be strong, and don’t let your hands be slack; for your work will be rewarded.”

역대하 15:8.content: When Asa heard these words, and the prophecy of Oded the prophet, he took courage, and put away the abominations out of all the land of Judah and Benjamin, and out of the cities which he had taken from the hill country of Ephraim; and he renewed Yahweh’s altar that was before Yahweh’s porch.

역대하 15:9.content: He gathered all Judah and Benjamin, and those who lived with them out of Ephraim, Manasseh, and Simeon; for they came to him out of Israel in abundance when they saw that Yahweh his God was with him.

역대하 15:10.content: So they gathered themselves together at Jerusalem in the third month, in the fifteenth year of Asa’s reign.

역대하 15:11.content: They sacrificed to Yahweh in that day, of the plunder which they had brought, seven hundred head of cattle and seven thousand sheep.

역대하 15:12.content: They entered into the covenant to seek Yahweh, the God of their fathers, with all their heart and with all their soul;

역대하 15:13.content: and that whoever would not seek Yahweh, the God of Israel, should be put to death, whether small or great, whether man or woman.

역대하 15:14.content: They swore to Yahweh with a loud voice, with shouting, with trumpets, and with cornets.

역대하 15:15.content: All Judah rejoiced at the oath, for they had sworn with all their heart, and sought him with their whole desire; and he was found by them. Then Yahweh gave them rest all around.

역대하 15:16.content: Also Maacah, the mother of Asa the king, he removed from being queen, because she had made an abominable image for an Asherah; so Asa cut down her image, ground it into dust, and burned it at the brook Kidron.

역대하 15:17.content: But the high places were not taken away out of Israel; nevertheless the heart of Asa was perfect all his days.

역대하 15:18.content: He brought the things that his father had dedicated, and that he himself had dedicated, silver, gold, and vessels into God’s house.

역대하 15:19.content: There was no more war to the thirty-fifth year of Asa’s reign.
